meanings.definition: a macintosh made from cotton fabric treated with oil and pigment to make it waterproof
a person with good manners and stylish clothing
someone who leads you to believe something that is not true
made slick by e.g. ice or grease
examples: roads are slickest when rain has just started and hasn't had time to wash away the oil

meanings.definition: having a smooth, gleaming surface reflecting light

examples: cunning men often pass for wise
